From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 29 Apr 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-04-29
Message-ID: <4ty6UmjET7qClMxDQahrZQ@geopod-ismtpd-37>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="2b13377c2d3308e5d42f55266d37e6f0d0568e61e57189220cceb8ed401e"

Hi there, Friends of LlamaIndex! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter!
We're thrilled to share some exciting updates, including the
introduction of thousands of MCP servers, a DeepSeek-based
Perplexity clone, and insights from our co-founder Jerry Liu's
guest lecture on document workflow agents. Dive into these
highlights and more as we continue to innovate and enhance your
experience with LlamaIndex!

🤩 The Highlights:

* AI Agent for Company Risk Reports: Discover how to build an AI
agent that auto-generates risk reports over public filings. Learn
more here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..0du81dRUdhvLJEd2v8waP0r2unyFxTvQWCDmR1OuwxU ).
* DeepSeek-Based Perplexity Clone: Discover this impressive clone
by Karan Vaidya that takes less than 100 lines of code to
implement! Watch the video or access the code here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..HqGaRYTGSOM_bugDvCmBX7CKR8wJbwPmE2fzjHjDDA8 ).
* Guest Lecture on Document Workflow Agents: Our co-founder Jerry
Liu discusses the evolution of LlamaIndex, advanced document
parsing, and multimodal capabilities. Catch the recording here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..H6eMz2HQ_XRXwrjw2qhIVUsyAsLMSZU_HLyqeKpfHM4 ).

🗺️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* Building Compliance Reports with LLMs: Learn how to set up an
index on LlamaCloud and define a schema for clause extraction and
compliance checking in this informative video here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Hqga2mYSXWZwY2q0v76RxofluHg9PsVUp_xiuDPqN1I ).
* Multi-Modal Model Support: Explore our latest support for
multi-modal models, embeddings, and indexes in this notebook here
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7XqpHrSDtIKAEcREDNvopD6Tn77-Cp2MF31luFymE5A ).

✨ Framework:

* Thousands of MCP Servers Now Available: Connect to any MCP
server in just a single line of code! Check out the example here
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..iuk5aZia0mbM7LSk5LkM1B82YMxcxQTvCFPjONzf5rs ).
* Agentic Document Workflow (ADW) Guide: Discover how to build an
ADW that scales better and integrates with your existing software
ecosystem. Read the in-depth guide here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wX5AeLr0HRYBZ0etAlpdwAawXshDB1N0qBWFnqeXcOo ) .
* Integration with Milvus for Full-Text Search: Learn how to use
full-text search with BM25 in this tutorial here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..9cpQN3mPHXppMbMDA58awxRXP_5NSC37TAakNDqGCeQ ).

✍️ Community:

* ZapGit: Manage GitHub issues and PRs through a natural language
client, powered by MCP and integrated into an agent workflow.
Check it out here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..pK8yotszzvqfJUyHiMEgEsCfQJxW8AZwYriuLn7Uu3k ).
* Full-Stack JavaScript Web App for Financial Analysis: Explore
our open-source app that uses LlamaExtract for extracting risk
factors from corporate annual reports. Access the repo here 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xsi4WLafS5UjfvjQtT7x0LHdiiyTsTvTA5PEW0i0AvM ).

Stay tuned for more updates, and as always, feel free to reach
out to us with any questions or feedback!

Best,
The LlamaIndex Team

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..704x30SwrLnOftVO_pizFoscDi5pP3YheZ4vJqv6jOc )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..zAFt56qnyQdgYvOIf7a5-6Eblz51TIGgNnyCxSuvNC8 )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ZV74sYTFPomHkl1PzKvrOt47Iq5LTlaSHob1M4ea9CM )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
